files.name: input.directive.ts
input.variants.ts

docs.overview:
# Input

Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input field.
docs.api: # API ## [z-input] Directive > z-input is a Directive, it accepts all props which are supported by native input. To get a customized input, just pass the following props to the directive. | Property | Description | Type | Default | | --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------- | --------- | | `[zSize]` | input size | `default \| sm \| lg` | `default` | | `[zStatus]` | input status | `error \| warning \| success` | `null` | | `[zBorderless]` | input without border | `boolean` | `false` |
